seoTitle: Garland ISD Calendar 2027-2028: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Garland ISD 2027-2028 calendar with Aug 9 first day, May 24 last day, fall break, holidays, breaks, early dismissal, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Garland ISD starts the 2027-2028 school year on August 9, 2027 and lists May 24, 2028 as the last day of class with early dismissal. Fall Break runs October 11-15, Thanksgiving Break runs November 22-26, Winter Break runs December 20-31, and Spring Break runs March 13-17. The calendar lists 82 days in the first semester and 93 days in the second semester.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Garland ISD start school in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Garland ISD starts the 2027-2028 school year on Monday, August 9, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Garland ISD Fall Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Fall Break runs Monday, October 11 through Friday, October 15, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Garland ISD Spring Break in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 13 through Friday, March 17, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Garland ISD in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of class is Wednesday, May 24, 2028, with early dismissal.

yearNumbers.label: Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar lists 82 first-semester days and 93 second-semester days.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Break
yearNumbers.detail: Garland ISD schedules a full week of Fall Break before the second grading period begins.

yearNumbers.label: Early Dismissal
yearNumbers.detail: Early dismissal is listed on December 17 and May 24.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2026-2027 Calendar
content: The first day moves from August 10 in 2026 to August 9 in 2027.
Spring Break moves from March 15-19 in 2027 to March 13-17 in 2028.
The last day moves from May 27 in 2027 to May 24 in 2028.
